popularity: medium — common for organizations using Pipedrive pipeline management + Mailchimp email marketing

authentication_requirements.pipedrive_side: API Token (x-api-token header) or OAuth 2.0. v2 API required (v1 deprecated July 31, 2026).
authentication_requirements.mailchimp_side: OAuth 2.0 or API Key. Audience manager permissions.

common_use_cases: Pipedrive deal 'Won' → Mailchimp list add + tag 'customer'
Pipedrive person created → Mailchimp audience member with merge fields
Pipedrive deal stage update → Mailchimp segment membership change
Pipedrive activity completed → Mailchimp automation trigger
Bulk Pipedrive person import → Mailchimp audience sync

pipedrive_endpoints.purpose: Search persons by email for matching

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Pipedrive v2 hash key field IDs in custom data
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Pipedrive v2 sends custom field data keyed by hash key (a1b2c3d4), not numeric ID. Middleware expecting numeric keys reads empty values.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: After migrating to v2, fetch all custom field schemas and update middleware field mappings to use hash keys.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Pipedrive persons can be created without an email. Mailchimp requires email as primary key. Sync silently skips these persons.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Filter Pipedrive persons with email = null before sync. Log skipped persons for manual data enrichment.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Mailchimp enforces daily add limits (new subscribers) based on plan. Bulk Pipedrive sync exceeds limit. Mailchimp rejects.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Monitor Mailchimp subscriber count vs plan limit. Spread bulk syncs across multiple days. Delete inactive subscribers first.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Pipedrive webhook fires on deal update even when stage doesn't change. Middleware sends duplicate 'customer' tags to Mailchimp.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Track deal stage transitions in middleware. Only trigger Mailchimp actions on actual stage changes, not every update.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Custom field mapping between v1 and v2 field IDs
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: During v1→v2 migration, custom field IDs change from numeric to hash keys. Mailchimp mapping table becomes stale.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Rebuild custom field mapping table after v2 migration. Do not rely on cached field ID mappings.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Person merge in Pipedrive duplicates Mailchimp member
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Two Pipedrive persons merged. Middleware receives update for both old and new person IDs. Mailchimp gets duplicate or inconsistent data.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Handle person merge events in middleware: identify merged persons by email dedup. Archive old Mailchimp member before adding new.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Pipedrive deals have associated persons. Middleware watches deal stage changes but doesn't export associated person data to Mailchimp.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: When deal stage triggers Mailchimp action, fetch associated person(s) via GET /persons/{id} and include their data in Mailchimp sync.

community_solutions.problem: Pipedrive webhook delivery guarantees — at least once
community_solutions.solution: Pipedrive 'at least once' delivery can produce duplicate webhook events. Use idempotency key in middleware.
Mailchimp subscriber_hash = md5(email.toLowerCase()). Ensure email is lowercased before hashing for PATCH operations.
